---
title: "Review: Sage Handbook of Transport Studies, Jean-Paul Rodrigue, Theo Notteboom, Jon Shaw (Eds.). Sage, London (2013). £95, Hardback, ISBN: 978-1-84920-789-8"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). Review: Sage Handbook of Transport Studies, Jean-Paul Rodrigue, Theo Notteboom, Jon Shaw (Eds.). Sage, London (2013). £95, Hardback, ISBN: 978-1-84920-789-8. *Journal of Transport Geography*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2014.05.002"
date: "2014-05-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_review_2014"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Journal of Transport Geography"
doi: "10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2014.05.002"
publication-url: "http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S096669231400088X"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This book review provides a critical assessment of the \"Sage Handbook of Transport Studies.\" It evaluates the volume’s contribution to the fields of transport geography, policy research, and urban planning."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Journal of Transport Geography
**Year:** 2014

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2014.05.002) [Publisher Link](http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S096669231400088X) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This book review provides a critical assessment of the "Sage Handbook of Transport Studies." It evaluates the volume’s contribution to the fields of transport geography, policy research, and urban planning.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). Review: Sage Handbook of Transport Studies, Jean-Paul Rodrigue, Theo Notteboom, Jon Shaw (Eds.). Sage, London (2013). £95, Hardback, ISBN: 978-1-84920-789-8. *Journal of Transport Geography*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2014.05.002

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_review_2014,
	title = {Review: {Sage} {Handbook} of {Transport} {Studies}, {Jean}-{Paul} {Rodrigue}, {Theo} {Notteboom}, {Jon} {Shaw} ({Eds}.). {Sage}, {London} (2013). £95, {Hardback}, {ISBN}: 978-1-84920-789-8},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	issn = {09666923},
	url = {http://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S096669231400088X},
	doi = {10.1016/j.jtrangeo.2014.05.002},
	abstract = {This book review provides a critical assessment of the "Sage Handbook of Transport Studies." It evaluates the volume's contribution to the fields of transport geography, policy research, and urban planning.},
	journal = {Journal of Transport Geography},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = may,
	year = {2014},
	keywords = {Book review, Review},
	pages = {2013--2014},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
